visual_description: The man in the pink plaid shirt looks at his watch and then at the man in the blue plaid shirt, who is turned towards him. The man in the pink shirt then looks up and to his left with a surprised expression. The man in the blue shirt is mostly seen from the back and side.
audio_description: A male voice speaks, followed by a short, high-pitched electronic beep.
